## Evidence Gate Checklist
- [ ] Backend Typecheck (`make typecheck`) passes
- [ ] Frontend Typecheck (`npm run type-check`) passes
- [ ] Backend Tests (`make test`) pass
- [ ] Documentation Checks (`make docs-check`) pass
- [ ] Security Scans (`make security`) pass
- [ ] Frontend Build (`make build`) succeeds

## Compliance Checklist
- [ ] No autonomous credit decision states (AUTO_APPROVE, etc.)
- [ ] Clean separation between System Recommendation and Human Decision
- [ ] Environment variables used for all credentials
- [ ] UI reflects accurate state handling without autonomous wording
